description: Memory insight synthesis should produce at least one insight with actionable next steps.

insights.title: Recurring watershed funding opportunities
insights.summary: The coop has encountered three watershed restoration grant leads in the past two weeks, suggesting a seasonal funding window.
insights.whyItMatters: Acting on this pattern now could secure funding before the application window closes.
insights.suggestedNextStep: Compile the three leads into a capital formation brief and schedule a coop review.
